_comment_1: This is an annotated example template for adding custom bank support
_comment_2: Remove all _comment fields before using - JSON doesn't support comments
_comment_id: Unique identifier: lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores only
name: My Bank Name
_comment_name: Human-readable name shown in logs and output
_comment_enabled: Set to false to disable without deleting the file

detection._comment_iban: Regex pattern for IBAN matching. Generic pattern matches all IBANs (2-letter country + 2 digits + up to 30 alphanumeric). Use specific pattern like IE[0-9]{2}MYBK.* if you need to match specific bank codes.
detection._comment_filename: OPTIONAL: Glob patterns with wildcards (*) for PDF filename matching. If omitted, defaults to *.pdf (all PDFs). Only specify if you want to restrict to certain filename patterns.
detection._comment_keywords: Unique keywords found in PDF header/first page
detection._comment_columns: Expected column names in transaction table

extraction._comment_extraction: Defines where transaction data is located on each page
extraction._comment_table_top: Y-coordinate where transaction table starts (from bottom of page)
extraction._comment_table_bottom: Y-coordinate where transaction table ends (from bottom of page)
extraction._comment_header_check: Whether to verify column headers exist above table
extraction._comment_header_y: Y-coordinate to search for column headers (only if enable_header_check=true)
extraction._comment_page_validation: Whether to validate page structure before extraction

columns._comment_columns_obj: X-coordinate ranges [left, right] for each column in PDF points
columns._comment_date: Date column: left edge at x=26, right edge at x=78

processing._comment_processing: Defines how to parse extracted text data
processing._comment_multiline: true if descriptions can span multiple lines (e.g., Revolut), false for single-line (e.g., AIB)
processing._comment_currency: Currency symbol used in amounts (€, $, £, etc.)
processing._comment_decimal: Character separating whole and fractional amounts (usually . or ,)

_comment_usage: Copy this file to templates/mybank.json (remove _comment fields) and customize for your bank
